description_long: This is a vintage-style vending machine with a rectangular, upright form and rounded top edges, predominantly painted in red with a white upper section. The front features a vertical row of circular selection buttons on the left, a central display panel with the word 'THIRSTY??', and a payment interface to the right, all set into a weathered, chipped surface. The lower front displays a retrieval slot with a metallic grille, and the machine's surface shows signs of age, including scratches, dents, and worn paint. The sides are mostly plain red with some visible wear and a vented panel near the base. The back is featureless, painted red, and shows further signs of surface wear. Branding and signage, including the words 'Soda' and 'Cola', are visible on the front, along with a stylized logo and some decorative script.
description: A weathered, vintage red-and-white vending machine with a row of selection buttons, a payment panel, and prominent branding on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the selection buttons, display panel, payment interface, product retrieval slot, and visible branding.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain red surface with a vented panel at the bottom and visible paint wear.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, solid red surface with some surface texture and wear.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a vented panel at the bottom and more visible chipping and wear.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the front, above the product retrieval slot and to the right of the selection buttons, with the word 'THIRSTY??' visible.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the front right, featuring a coin slot and possibly a bill acceptor, with metallic and plastic components.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of six circular selection buttons is located on the left side of the front panel, each individually separated.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot with a metallic grille is located at the lower front of the machine.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding includes the words 'Soda' and 'Cola' in stylized script at the top front, a logo reading 'Cents' near the bottom, and additional decorative text, all in white against the red background.
